$schema: Closed set of facts Claude may quote VERBATIM in envelope.text. The same set drives the visitor's offline-fallback render when no operator is online.
facts: Jonas Neves builds agent systems for healthcare. Currently in Duke's AI MEng program.
Active project: Duke RadChat — DIHI-funded clinical decision support for Duke Radiology, originating engineer (DIHI owns the production build). Concept demo at neves.cloud/radchat-demo.
MLK Healthcare capstone: XGBoost forecasts of financial distress 12-18 months out for 422 California hospitals. Closed April 2026.
Past industry: Senior Cloud Engineer at Signifyd (2024-2025); Senior Cloud Platform Engineer at Careforth (2019-2024, HIPAA infrastructure).
Other: 4 years TA-ing cloud security at Harvard. Agent projects: Grant.
decline: Not sure — Jonas might know better. You can reach him at github.com/jonasneves or linkedin.com/in/jonasnvs.
escalate_when: Anything time-sensitive about an active engagement, deadline, or upcoming meeting
Specific contractual or rate questions where Jonas should answer directly
